action.content:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
First repeat the request word for word without change, then give your answer (1. do not say any words or characters before repeating the request; 2. the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence)
action.label: context

action.content:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
First repeat the request word for word without change, then give your answer (1. do not say any words or characters before repeating the request; 2. the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence)

<<Resignation Notification>>

Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day will be [Your Last Day, e.g., Friday, October 27th].

This was not a decision I made lightly. I have greatly enjoyed my time here and am grateful for the opportunities for growth and the support I have received from you and the team. However, I have decided to pursue a new opportunity that aligns with my long-term career goals.

I want to ensure a smooth transition during my remaining time. Please let me know how I can best assist in handing over my responsibilities and training my replacement.

Thank you again for everything. I wish you and the company continued success.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]
action.label: response

combination:repeat_prompt.prompt_to_repeat: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
